name: aeroftp-mcp
description: Configure the AeroFTP MCP server for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Windsurf. Access 16 file management tools across 22 storage protocols (FTP, SFTP, S3, WebDAV, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, and more) directly from your AI assistant. Requires AeroFTP CLI v3.5.4 or later.

aeroftp-mcp.cliPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to `aeroftp-cli` binary. Leave empty for automatic detection via PATH.

aeroftp-mcp.showStatusBar.description: Show AeroFTP MCP status in the status bar.

walkthroughs.title: Set up AeroFTP MCP Server
walkthroughs.description: Connect Claude Code to your remote servers via AeroFTP

steps.title: Install AeroFTP CLI
steps.description:
AeroFTP CLI must be installed on your system.

**Linux (Snap)**
```
sudo snap install aeroftp
```

**Linux (AUR)**
```
yay -S aeroftp-bin
```

**Linux (deb/rpm/AppImage)**: Download from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/axpdev-lab/aeroftp/releases)

**macOS/Windows**: Download from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/axpdev-lab/aeroftp/releases)

[Verify installation](command:aeroftp-mcp.diagnose)

steps.title: Configure MCP Server
steps.description:
Register the AeroFTP MCP server in Claude Code's configuration.

[Install MCP Server](command:aeroftp-mcp.install)

steps.title: Verify Setup
steps.description:
Check that everything is working correctly.

[Check Status](command:aeroftp-mcp.status)
